Customer Service Knowledge Base (Example) 
1. Company Overview 
• Company Name: Acme Electronics 
• Mission: To provide high-quality electronics with excellent customer support. 
• Hours of Operation: Monday–Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM; Saturday 10 AM – 4 PM 
2. Contact Information 
• Phone: 123-456-7890 
• Email: support@acmeelectronics.com 
• Live Chat: Available on the website from 9 AM – 6 PM 
3. Shipping & Delivery 
• Standard shipping: 5–7 business days 
• Express shipping: 2–3 business days 
• Free shipping on orders over $50 
• Tracking: Customers can track using the tracking number emailed after shipment 
4. Returns & Refunds 
• Return window: 30 days from delivery 
• Items must be in original condition and packaging 
• Refunds processed within 5 business days after receiving returned item 
• Exchanges: Available for defective items 
5. Common Issues & Solutions 
• Issue: Product not turning on 
Solution: Check battery installation or power cable. Contact support if issue 
persists. 
• Issue: Wrong item delivered 
Solution: Contact support with order number. Replacement will be shipped 
within 3–5 business days. 
• Issue: Refund not received 
Solution: Confirm return tracking. Refunds take up to 5 business days after item 
is received. 
6. FAQs  • How can I track my order? → Use the tracking link in the shipment email. 
• Can I cancel my order? → Orders can be canceled within 2 hours of purchase. 
• Do you offer international shipping? → Currently, we only ship within the UK.
